<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="vi"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport">
<title>Ghi lại mọi khoảnh khắc - Feature Introduction</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Newsreader:opsz,wght@6..72,400;500;600;700&amp;family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: "class",
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    "colors": {
                        "on-tertiary-fixed": "#2e1507",
                        "inverse-surface": "#30312e",
                        "on-tertiary-container": "#4e3020",
                        "error": "#ba1a1a",
                        "inverse-on-surface": "#f2f1ec",
                        "on-secondary": "#ffffff",
                        "background": "#fbf9f4",
                        "on-secondary-fixed": "#2c1600",
                        "on-primary-fixed": "#07200f",
                        "outline": "#737972",
                        "secondary": "#7d562d",
                        "primary-fixed-dim": "#b0ceb2",
                        "tertiary-container": "#c29782",
                        "outline-variant": "#c2c8c0",
                        "on-surface": "#1b1c19",
                        "surface-container-highest": "#e4e2dd",
                        "secondary-container": "#ffca98",
                        "on-surface-variant": "#424842",
                        "on-background": "#1b1c19",
                        "error-container": "#ffdad6",
                        "tertiary": "#7a5644",
                        "tertiary-fixed": "#ffdbcb",
                        "surface-dim": "#dbdad5",
                        "on-primary-container": "#233d29",
                        "surface": "#fbf9f4",
                        "primary": "#4a654e",
                        "inverse-primary": "#b0ceb2",
                        "on-primary": "#ffffff",
                        "surface-variant": "#e4e2dd",
                        "secondary-fixed": "#ffdcbd",
                        "surface-bright": "#fbf9f4",
                        "surface-container": "#f0eee9",
                        "surface-container-low": "#f5f3ee",
                        "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#ebbda6",
                        "on-error-container": "#93000a",
                        "primary-fixed": "#cceace",
                        "surface-container-high": "#eae8e3",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#603f2f",
                        "surface-tint": "#4a654e",
                        "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#623f18",
                        "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff",
                        "on-tertiary": "#ffffff",
                        "on-secondary-container": "#7a532a",
                        "primary-container": "#8ba88e",
                        "on-error": "#ffffff",
                        "secondary-fixed-dim": "#f0bd8b",
                        "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#334d38"
                    },
                    "borderRadius": {
                        "DEFAULT": "0.25rem",
                        "lg": "0.5rem",
                        "xl": "0.75rem",
                        "full": "9999px"
                    },
                    "spacing": {
                        "sm": "8px",
                        "container-margin": "20px",
                        "gutter": "12px",
                        "xl": "40px",
                        "md": "16px",
                        "lg": "24px",
                        "xs": "4px",
                        "unit": "4px"
                    },
                    "fontFamily": {
                        "body-md": ["Plus Jakarta Sans"],
                        "title-lg": ["Plus Jakarta Sans"],
                        "display-lg": ["Newsreader"],
                        "headline-md": ["Newsreader"],
                        "label-sm": ["Plus Jakarta Sans"]
                    },
                    "fontSize": {
                        "body-md": ["16px", { "lineHeight": "24px", "fontWeight": "400" }],
                        "title-lg": ["20px", { "lineHeight": "28px", "fontWeight": "600" }],
                        "display-lg": ["40px", { "lineHeight": "48px", "letterSpacing": "-0.02em", "fontWeight": "600" }],
                        "headline-md": ["28px", { "lineHeight": "36px", "fontWeight": "500" }],
                        "label-sm": ["12px", { "lineHeight": "16px", "letterSpacing": "0.05em", "fontWeight": "500" }]
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined {
            font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 24;
        }
    </style>
<style>
    body {
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);
    }
  </style>
  </head>
<body class="bg-background text-on-background min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center font-body-md antialiased selection:bg-secondary-container selection:text-on-secondary-container">
<div class="w-full max-w-md min-h-[884px] flex flex-col justify-between bg-surface sm:rounded-[32px] sm:shadow-[0_20px_40px_rgba(74,101,78,0.05)] sm:min-h-[850px] relative overflow-hidden sm:my-8 border sm:border-outline-variant/30">
<!-- Texture overlay for analog feel -->
<div class="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none opacity-30 mix-blend-multiply" style="background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox=%220 0 200 200%22 xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%3E%3Cfilter id=%22noiseFilter%22%3E%3CfeTurbulence type=%22fractalNoise%22 baseFrequency=%220.65%22 numOctaves=%223%22 stitchTiles=%22stitch%22/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width=%22100%25%22 height=%22100%25%22 filter=%22url(%23noiseFilter)%22/%3E%3C/svg%3E'); z-index: 1;"></div>
<!-- Top Header -->
<header class="flex items-center px-container-margin py-md z-10 justify-start"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Scalendar Brand Logo" class="w-10 h-10 object-contain">
<button aria-label="Go back" class="w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-surface-container-low text-on-surface hover:bg-surface-container-high transition-colors active:scale-95 duration-150 ml-auto">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined" data-icon="arrow_back">arrow_back</span>
</button>
<div class="font-label-sm text-label-sm text-outline tracking-widest uppercase ml-4">
                5 / 7
            </div>
 <!-- Spacer for balance -->
</header>
<!-- Center Content -->
<main class="flex-grow flex flex-col items-center justify-center px-container-margin py-xl z-10">
<div class="w-32 h-32 rounded-full bg-tertiary-fixed flex items-center justify-center mb-10 shadow-[0_8px_24px_rgba(122,86,68,0.15)] ring-1 ring-white/50 relative">
<div class="absolute inset-0 rounded-full border border-tertiary-fixed-dim/50 scale-[1.15]"></div>
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-[64px] text-tertiary" data-icon="book_5" style="font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 1;">book_5</span>
</div>
<div class="text-center max-w-[280px] space-y-4">
<h1 class="font-headline-md text-headline-md text-on-surface">
                    Ghi lại mọi khoảnh khắc
                </h1>
<p class="font-body-md text-body-md text-on-surface-variant">
                    Nhật ký theo dõi những việc quan trọng trong cuộc sống bạn
                </p>
</div>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Actions -->
<footer class="px-container-margin pb-10 pt-6 flex flex-col items-center gap-8 z-10 bg-gradient-to-t from-surface to-transparent">
<!-- Progress Dots -->
<div class="flex gap-2.5">
<div class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-surface-container-highest transition-colors"></div>
<div class="w-8 h-2 rounded-full bg-primary shadow-sm transition-all duration-300"></div>
<div class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-surface-container-highest transition-colors"></div>
</div>
<!-- Primary Button -->
<button class="w-full bg-primary hover:bg-surface-tint text-on-primary py-4 px-6 rounded-full font-title-lg text-title-lg shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(74,101,78,0.2)] active:scale-[0.98] transition-all duration-200 flex justify-center items-center">
                Tiếp tục
            </button>
</footer>
</div>


</body></html>
